description: Third-slice fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The third-slice Bermuda Triangle recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Third Fixture Consumption and Multi-Fixture Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the third runtime fixture can be consumed safely, export reviewable deck text, then decide whether the fixture set is ready for another scale step.

tasks.title: Third fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate the Bermuda Triangle runtime fixture independently from the M45 generator.

tasks.title: Third fixture deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the Bermuda Triangle fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Third fixture headless load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the Bermuda Triangle fixture through offline/headless paths without UI or bot mutation.

tasks.title: Multi-fixture scale decision
tasks.goal: Review Nova Grappler, Oracle Think Tank, and Bermuda Triangle fixture evidence before selecting any further slice.
